c.d: How precisely the app compares prices across multiple retailers and updates with the latest deals
Number and quality of coupons, discount codes, or cashback offers available via the app
How intuitive and user-friendly the app interface is for searching and finding offers
Ability to scan product barcodes or QR codes to instantly compare prices and find deals
Effectiveness of the app in finding offers and discounts at nearby physical stores or local sellers
Whether the app supports user negotiation with sellers on item prices
Availability of the app on major platforms (iOS, Android, others) to maximize user access
Range of product categories covered by the app for searching offers (electronics, clothes, food, etc.)
